service.name: Bitrix24 REST API
service.description_for_ai: Популярная платформа для бизнеса в России и СНГ. CRM, задачи, проекты, коммуникации, HR, документооборот. Бесплатный план до 5 пользователей. Используй для управления компанией, CRM, задачами.

auth.how_to_get: Приложения → Добавить приложение → Вебхук или OAuth
auth.cost: Бесплатно до 5 пользователей. Базовый от 2490 руб/мес

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get CRM leads from Bitrix24. Filter by status, responsible user, date. Returns ID, title, name, phone, email, status.

filter.description: Filter by fields: {STATUS_ID: 'NEW', ASSIGNED_BY_ID: 1, >DATE_CREATE: '2024-01-01'}. Empty {} returns all.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a new task in Bitrix24. Assign to user, set deadline, add description and checklist items.

fields.description: {TITLE: 'Task name' (required), RESPONSIBLE_ID: user_id, DESCRIPTION: 'Details', DEADLINE: '2024-12-31T18:00:00+03:00', PRIORITY: 0|1|2, GROUP_ID: group_id, PARENT_ID: parent_task_id}

agent_hints.auth: Use webhook or OAuth. Webhook: Settings → Developer resources → Inbound webhooks. Scope: task, crm.
agent_hints.portal: Replace {portal} with your Bitrix24 subdomain e.g. mycompany.bitrix24.ru
agent_hints.pagination: All list methods return 50 items max. Use start=50, 100, 150... to paginate.
agent_hints.ru_market: Most popular all-in-one business platform in Russia and CIS. Includes CRM, tasks, HR, documents, chat.
